CONTENT.Club career: Born in Adria, Soncin started his career on AC Milan youth system. After five years in the club, on 15 August 2020 he left AC Milan and joined Serie C club Pergolettese.Soncin made his Pergolettese and Professional debut on 7 April 2021 against Renate.
CONTENT.External links: Matteo Soncin at WorldFootball.netMatteo Soncin at TuttoCalciatori.net (in Italian)

SUMMARY: Matteo Soncin (born 28 March 2001) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie C Group C club  Taranto.
